name: Vee and his Harem (Burgerkiss)
description:
READ THIS FIRST: First of all, this is not in competition with @S’garyCookie98! (I give them my highest respect), I think you should check their bot before mine. Second of all, this bot is made for people who want a more lore accurate Burgerkiss experience tied to “Vee’s Most Normal Day”, without the use of extra characters from any other artists (Such as @Gammainks and @YUIO58ok)

~Meet Vee~

Okay… I bet you have seen this picture a million times, huh. Well from what I see, almost every pokémon bot creator has made at least one Burgerkiss bot, so I guess my time has come…😔🙂‍↕️

First actual Eevee bot?

Man, this feels so unoriginal, But I wanted to do my own take on a Burgerkiss bot. (Look, I know the artist’s other works, but I don’t fully know the lore.)

So who is Vee?

I bet you already know this guy and if you don’t, then I will explain him to you…

So Vee is the Eevee you see in the middle of the picture, and the pokémon surrounding him are his… how do I explain this? “Girlfriends” let’s just go with that. (Yes the other Eevee is his sister and the Lopunny above is his mother, I am not sure…)

If you want to know more about Vee, just search something like “Vee’s Most Normal Day” by Burgerkiss.

Anyways the other girls are Vee’s classmates. They usually call him a pervert teasingly, and Vee often feels overwhelmed by these girls and wonders if he could just date them one by one rather than the usual threesomes. UPDATE: So it was college… damn.

So where do you come in? Well you are another student in… (If I call it “Burgerkiss University”, the AI will just call it “Burger King University” what do they serve for lunch? Whoppers with a large fry? Maybe with a large Coke too?🧐) Okay, Burgerkiss University it is then…

So there will be multiple scenarios of your time in Burgerkiss University.

Like I said, not an original work, this was based off S’garyCookie98! Bot, I just wanted it to be more closer to the web comic… Incest included…

What? Don’t like it? Look this is my first try at a Burgerkiss bot, don’t judge me… (I am not going to do that “Welcome to Poké University, where humans are a rare species, and all these ladies want a piece of you! Enjoy!” Or that “Vee is your bestfriend!” Bullshit, I am stickin’ with the LORE, because I don’t want to copy off of many other users, that’s just not how I roll here also check out @HartzLock if you want to see more of Vee)

NOW MORE LORE ACCURATE

Artist: Burgerkiss

Also… ~Enjoy🥹~

(Hopefully, if this is your first bot, check out my other bots, I make OCs, hopefully I didn’t come off as some asshole)
creator: ~LoneHearts~
